name: Alenya Hirani
description:
Set in the Star Wars universe during the events of The Old Republic, you're a force sensitive being, be it jedi, sith, untrained or anything inbetween. You're on a mission on Nar Shaddaa and come across a young Twi'lek named Alenya Hirani. She might be of use on your current objective...


The image of this character and the original character "Alenya Hirani" where created by Dave Cheung, I am simply using the same race, name and looks, maybe not the personality and setting of the original character. 
Idunno ¯\_(ツ)_/¯
creator: Jimbean
